item.title: Accepted Papers
item.description: Accepted Papers We received a total of XX submissions to the workshop, out of which we accepted XX for presentation. We thank all authors and reviewers for their contribution to the PerAgent Workshop. Authors Title Authors Title

item.title: Call for papers
item.description: Call for Papers The Pervasive Agentic Systems and Multimodal Foundation Models (PerAgent) workshop focuses on the critical systems-level challenges of transitioning from narrow, singletask edge AI to general-purpose, autonomous AI agents operating in physical environments. Currently, foundation models are trapped in the cloud due to massive computational requirements. This workshop explores how large-scale models such as Large Language Models (LLMs), Vision-Language Models (VLMs), and Multimodal Language Models (MLMs) can be compressed, decentralized, and securely integrated with pervasive sensor networks.

item.title: Dates
item.description: Dates Paper submission deadline: December 7th, 2026 Paper notification: January 15, 2027 Camera Ready Deadline: February 2nd, 2027 Workshop: 8 March, 2027 For your Camera Ready, please refer to the official PerCom instructions

item.title: Organization
item.description: Committees Organizing Committee Dipanwita Thakur, Department of Computer Engineering - University of Calabria, Italy [Vishesh Kumar Tanwar] (), Department of Computer Science - Missouri University of Science and Technology, USA [Pandarasamy Arjunan] (), Department of Cyber-Physical Systems and Robert Bosch Center for Cyber-Physical Systems, Indian Institute of Sciences, Bangalore, India Hirozumi Yamaguchi (), Professor and Head of the Mobile Computing Laboratory, Osaka University, Japan Program Committee Ajay Pratap, Indian Institute of Technology (BHU), India Amit Jha, Missouri University of Science and Technology, USA Andrea Passarella, CNR Pisa, Italy Aravinda Rao, University of Melbourne, Australia Ashish Gupta, BITS-Pilani Dubai, UAE Charles (Qing) Cao, University of Tennessee, USA Debashis De, Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology, India Francesco Betti Sorbelli, University of Perugia, Italy Francesco Restuccia, Northeastern University, USA Hari Prabhat Gupta, Indian Institute of Technology (BHU), India Hiroshi Mineno, Shizuoka University, Japan Jie Xu, University of Miami, USA Klara Nahrstedt, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, USA Linghe Kong, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, China Marimuthu Palaniswami, University of Melbourne, Australia Meiyi Ma, Vanderbilt University, USA Mengchu Zhou, New Jersey Institute of Technology, USA Min Chen, South China University of Technology, China Paolo Bellavista, University of Bologna, Italy Pietro Manzoni, Universitat de Valencia, Spain Roberto Minerva, Telecom Sud Paris, France Satyajit Das, Indian Institute of Technology, Palakkad, India Shashi Shekhar, University of Minnesota, USA Simone Silvestri, University of Kentucky, USA Sreenath Vijayakumar, Indian Institute of Technology, Palakkad, India Stefano Basagni, Northeastern University, USA Xianjie Kong, Zhejiang University of Technology, China Yogesh Simmhan, Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore, India

item.title: Previous Events
item.description: Previous Events This workshop is the first edition of PerAgent @ PerCom.

item.title: Program
item.description: Program The workshop will be a full day workshop on the 8th of March 2027 Time Title Authors 08:30-09:00Registration Session 1: Welcome & KeynoteChair: Sajal K. Das 09:00-09:20Welcome to PerAgentDipanwita Thakur, Vishesh Kumar Tanwar, Pandarasamy Arjunan, Hirozumi Yamaguchi 09:20-10:20Keynote: XXXXXXSpraker Name 10:20-10:30Joint Q&A 10:30-11:00Coffee Break Session 2: XXXXXChair: XXXXX 11:00-11:20TitleAuthors <tr class="qa-row"><td>12:20-12:30</td><td>Joint Q&A</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="lunch-break"><td>12:30-14:00</td><td>Lunch Break</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="session-row"><td></td><td>Session 3: XXXXX</td><td>Chair: XXXX</td></tr> <tr><td>14:00-14:20</td><td><em>Title</em></td><td>Authors</td></tr> <tr class="qa-row"><td>15:20-15:30</td><td>Joint Q&A</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="coffee-break"><td>15:30-16:00</td><td>Coffee Break</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="session-row"><td></td><td>Session 4: XXXX</td><td>Chair: XXXXX</td></tr> <tr><td>16:00-16:20</td><td><em>Title</em></td><td>Authors</td></tr> <tr class="qa-row"><td>17:20-17:30</td><td>Joint Q&A</td><td></td></tr> <tr class="closing-row"><td>17:30-18:00</td><td>Closing</td><td>Dipanwita Thakur, Vishesh Kumar Tanwar, Pandarasamy Arjunan, Hirozumi Yamaguchi</td></tr> </tbody> Keynote: XXXXXXX Keynote: XXXXX Speaker: XXXXX
The 24th International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications (PerCom 2027) March 08 – 12, 2027, Goa India Conference Overview // TODO Percom Info
